item.title: Why not?!?
item.description: Merry Yule time season!
item.dc:creator: McAlpinesFusiliers

item.title: Merry f*cking "2024 is almost over"
item.description:
Dear imgurians, here goes the obligatory Christmas-Selfie. This year has been a rollercoaster of the worst kind. In January my brother (31) got diagnosed with stage four cancer and it's been an absolute nightmare since then. I myself had to undergo surgery in July after being sick for quite a while. I also started my master's thesis, worked on the side to earn some money, tried to care for my brother as best as I could, fell in love and got my heart broken. Here's to a better next year. Thanks for making me giggle in these trying times.
Some cat tax, because he kept me sane this year.
item.dc:creator: VeryTinyCroissant

item.title: If John Wick was a software developer...
item.description:
Posting excerpts but link to full article: https://www.kjzz.org/the-show/2024-10-03/how-one-software-developer-is-using-ai-to-help-people-fight-health-insurance-denials Link for patients and professional resources: https://www.fighthealthinsurance.com/
I posted excerpts, but here's the link to the full article: https://www.kjzz.org/the-show/2024-10-03/how-one-software-developer-is-using-ai-to-help-people-fight-health-insurance-denials And here is the link to her website: https://www.fighthealthinsurance.com/ If this helps one person, then it was worth the effort to post it. Good luck, y'all.
item.dc:creator: wannasee

item.title: Backlogged memes from a simpler time
item.description:
That time being daylight savings two months ago Hello all, somehow we persevere
Bioshock infinite energy I wrote a novel version and I gotta say it’s a bop as a novel. Dm me if you want a pdf. It’s not really something I can sell I guess
They’ll be up again at 2am if you do that
Jesus has a lot of lore for a religious figure and I think that is his downfall. Be more mysterious man. Gandalf is definitely way more worshippable. If I found out he was part of an oppressed ethnic minority and had a job as a day laborer I’d be disenchanted. Just show up and walk on water and then bail
WHAT DID THEY THINK THE FRIZZLE WAS REFERRING TO? Do NOT make an autistic science lesbian this put together ok because nerdy autistic girls do not have the time or patience for HAIR IN OUR FACE (and whatever work went into this hairstyle)
Sesame Street was really something else. I just saw my first episode recently with the toddler and daaaaaaamn it went hard
Twas a different time
It did make me feel really loved
It’s a sex thing
I’d probably like dark academia if I wasn’t busy rereading my favorites from when I was 13 over and over. the shadow of the wind this week.
And then idk none of that and just stare at my computer screen berating myself for being behind on my writing
When researching the Aztecs I was repeatedly reminded of how similar it was to Catholicism and appalled at how judgy my Catholic school made it seem. My brother in Christ what do you think the crackers are????
Facts
I thought I was bad at this. Then looked on husbands computer and saw 700+ open tabs and thousands of unread emails. What.
Religion is just an elaborate scheme by the powerful to oppress women and undesirables. Maybe the roots are real but the practices are always rooted in bad faith and control. Learning about the history of Catholicism really opened my eyes.
True
Gamer Women have the same broad subcategories as gamer men and this same problem, people just do not get what gaming even is nowadays.
I’d actually believe in the standard all powerful deity if they’d be more fucking direct. As it is now I have plenty of proof that whatever thing is out there does not give a fuuuuck about me.
Someone sends me an email, I’m in trouble. Someone leaves a threatening voicemail, I’m in trouble. Someone cancels me, I’m in trouble. It never ends!
Spock, Jesus, what the hells the difference? - South Park, making a salient point
Hit a vein of memes I stole from @CodyBurkett
After hurricane harvey my family banded together and rebuilt 3 houses. For free. People do shit for reasons other than money shockingly
At this point I’m just sitting back and watching it. I watched so many people refuse to help me fix it. Hard to care about a world that doesn’t care about you.
Just finished shadow of the wind and it was good actually. Male gazey tho
Bit depressing but it does make my job as a historical fiction writer easier
Except I guess they fucked that up this year
This is just what the internet is like nowadays and I fucking hate it.
Same
Me in all my relationships. Spoiler alert even the people who ask for me to stand up for them end up hating me for standing up for myself or someone else.
Frankly insulting question atm. How am I? I’m pregnant and can’t take my meds and spiraling and the universe remains uncaring.
They do seem happy though. But yeah a flightless bird with wings is just mean
The thing. Idk I’m proud of it.
Merry Christmas all, or as the hicks in Bavaria say, Shöne Weihnachten! I will not be showing my face as last time I showed part of my foot I got harassed for it. Hope that answers some questions about my general mood as well. People are terrible, nobody cares about my life’s work, and really nobody cares about anything. Just their little circle of things. And it’s depressing. Goodnight all.
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: Just a Christmas selfie with a couple of memes for tax!! Happy Christmas everyone, hope you all have a great day!

item.title: Merry Christmas you filthy animals!
item.description: Hope you have a good one xx
item.dc:creator: IHaveACreepyOnion

item.title: Give it your all if you are struggling!
item.description: I'm ok if this dies in usersub. I had hoped to post a Christmas selfie this year, but I'm struggling so much that I can't bring myself to do so. For anyone out there also alone and struggling, GIVE IT YOUR ALL TO SURVIVE THIS. Sending Love to all you wonderful people on Imgur ❤️
item.dc:creator: Mynamedoesntmatteronlylifematters

item.dc:creator: thatdoginsunglasses

item.title: A random assortment of older memes, gifs, and videos to break up your selfie day.
item.description:
Quite possibly my favorite gif to ever come out of this site. So much joy.
She didn't see it coming.
She did.
Jet go WOOOOOOOOOOOOOOSSHHHHHHH
Spin your phone. Or don't. What am I, a cop?
So pure.
Holding that tango flourish. Absolute legend.
You had to know that's how it was going to go, didn't you.
Merry Christmas, ya filthy animals.
item.dc:creator: Fejerro

item.title: My small Kevin meme collection
item.description:
Have you ever noticed how many memes have the name Kevin in them?
I thought it was interesting, so I started collecting them.
I have some theories about why Kevin shows up so much.
I think it's sort of a "generic" name (no offense meant, Kevin).
Kevin seems to represent "some guy" really well.
But also, there's an element of... chaos?
Almost a bit of ineptitude (again, sorry Kev).
But at the same time, there's a power there.
Almost like a Bugs Bunny entity.
Or Loki
Or Florida Man
Anyway, I just think it's kind of neat.
I'd be happy to hear your theories about it.
And of course I'd love to see your Kevin memes.
I have some videos, but I couldn't figure out how to add them for some reason.
That's pretty much all I have to say.
But, I kinda committed to commenting below each of the pictures.
And it's a bit late now to change my mind.
So... how are you doing?
Holidays are happening. So that's cool, I guess.
I'm not a big celebrator of Christmas anymore.
I'm not a hater or anything, I just have a hard time getting into the "Christmas Spirit".
I'll be visiting family in the hospital for Christmas (they are in the hospital, not me).
And of course their is family drama.
The kids of the person in the hospital are dividing up their stuff like they are already dead.
It's pretty gross, and sadly not the first time I've seen stuff like that.
Hopefully you are having a better holiday.
Honestly, the drama isn't even why I'm not enjoying it.
I'm not even really all that involved in the drama.
Oh, thank god. I hate small talk. Peace!
item.dc:creator: ywmqm
